rules: Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) as the single sharp accent for primary actions and highlights.
Tinted Neutral Greys - 95% of the UI should be monochrome.
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for normal text.
Swiss Brutalist style: Use ONE font family but with radical weight contrast (e.g., Black vs Light).
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Lato, or Syne.
Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase + text-xs + wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
H1 MAXIMUM size: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl. Do not use text-7xl+.
Hierarchy gap rule: Jump between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 to p-12. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
spacing_and_layout.grid_marketing: MODE A: 'Tetris' Grid for the landing page. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12. Gap: gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetry, Visual Tension.
spacing_and_layout.grid_dashboard: MODE B: 'Control Room' Grid for the Excel Functions Dashboard. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-First. Never center by default. Left-align dense content.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.landing_cards: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Container: border-collapse. Items: border-r border-b border-border/40. Remove border on the last item to create an open edge.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_widgets: Flat Solid surfaces. 1px subtle border, NO soft shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid Background with a hard bottom border since it's a technical app. NEVER fully transparent.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.footer: Contrast Shift: Dark Footer (bg-black text-white) with massive space (py-20 or py-32). One massive element (text-[10vw]).

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). High contrast. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-[#002FA7]/90 hover:text-white).
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select but heavily customized to be flat, cardless, and brutally sharp.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone weight. Do not use lucide-react.
components.animations: Minimalist. Hover states, focus states, staggered entrance. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
components.charts: Use Shadcn chart components with high contrast monochrome palettes + Klein Blue.

rules: Hero Image Overlay Max opacity: bg-white/20 to bg-white/40 (light theme). Let the architectural image breathe.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

image_urls.description: Modern geometric ceiling structure with white arches. Use in the landing page hero section.
White geometric wooden structure. Use as subtle background texture for the AI Chatbot feature section.
Sunlight streams through patterned window. Use in one of the tall Bento grid cards on the landing page.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST install @phosphor-icons/react before proceeding: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
ALL interactive elements and key informational elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
Replace Lucide React imports with Phosphor Icons.
Customize Shadcn components to remove rounding (rounded-none) and soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid layout and strictly use the fonts and colors specified.
For the UI components like Dropdown, Calendar, Toast, you MUST use the shadcn/ui library instead of standard HTML elements.
